// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class PrimitiveBindingsImpl extends PrimitiveBindings:
    import PrimitiveBindingsImpl.*

    def add(a: Int, b: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Int =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.PrimitiveBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.PrimitiveBindings", "add")
            val retVal: Int = addMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, a, b)
            retVal
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end PrimitiveBindingsImpl

object PrimitiveBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.PrimitiveBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_prim")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()

    private val addMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("add").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_INT, JAVA_INT, JAVA_INT),
        capture
    )
end PrimitiveBindingsImpl
